tamami_arapca: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ أَلَمْ نَشْرَحْ لَكَ صَدْرَكَ وَوَضَعْنَا عَنكَ وِزْرَكَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنقَضَ ظَهْرَكَ وَرَفَعْنَا لَكَ ذِكْرَكَ فَإِنَّ مَعَ ٱلْعُسْرِ يُسْرًا إِنَّ مَعَ ٱلْعُسْرِ يُسْرًۭا فَإِذَا فَرَغْتَ فَٱنصَبْ وَإِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ فَٱرْغَب
tamami_okunus: E lem neşrah leke sadrek. Ve vedagna anke vizrek. Ellezi enkada zahrek. Ve refa'na leke zikrek. Fe inne maal usri yusra. İnne maal usri yusra. Fe iza feragte fensab. Ve ila rabbike fergab.
tamami_meal: Did We not expand for you, [O Muhammad], your breast? And We removed from you your burden, Which had weighed upon your back? And We raised high for you your repute. Indeed, with hardship [will be] ease. Indeed, with hardship [will be] ease. So when you have finished [your duties], then stand up [for worship]. And to your Lord direct your longing.
seo_meta_aciklama: The Inshirah Surah is a guide that brings tranquility to your heart. Discover the virtues of the Surah on this page!
semantik_etiketler: Inshirah Surah, Quran, prayer, spiritual peace, spiritual support
sayfa_giris_yazisi: The Inshirah Surah was revealed by Allah, the Most Gracious and Most Merciful, to send peace and comfort to the hearts of believers during their difficult times. This Surah serves as a great source of consolation when you face distress and challenges. The meaning of the Inshirah Surah is 'relief' and 'ease'. Each verse helps to lighten both material and spiritual burdens. Therefore, reading this Surah, especially in difficult moments or when seeking tranquility, offers spiritual calmness. The Inshirah Surah remains relevant as it touches the lives of hundreds of thousands of Muslims. On this page, you can find information about the virtues of this important Surah and how it should be recited.

tamami_arapca: بِّسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ وَٱلتِّينِ وَٱلزَّيْتُونِ وَطُورِ سِينِينَ وَهَٰذَا ٱلْبَلَدِ ٱلْأَمِينِ لَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَٰنَ فِىٓ أَحْسَنِ تَقْوِيمٍۢ ثُمَّ رَدَدْنَٰهُ أَسْفَلَ سَٰفِلِينَ إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ فَلَهُمْ أَجْرٌ غَيْرُ مَمْنُونٍۢ فَمَا يُكَذِّبُكَ بَعْدُ بِٱلدِّينِ أَلَيْسَ ٱللَّهُ بِأَحْكَمِ ٱلْحَٰكِمِينَ
tamami_okunus: Vet tini vez zeytun. Ve turi sinin. Ve hazel beledil emin. Lekad halaknel insane fi ahseni takvim. Summe redednahu esfele safilin. İllellezine amenu ve amilus salihati fe lehum ecrun gayru memnun. Fe ma yukezzibuke ba'du bid din. E leysallahu bi ahkemil hakimin.
tamami_meal: By the fig and the olive, And by Mount Sinai, And by this secure city, We have certainly created man in the best of stature; Then We return him to the lowest of the low, Except for those who believe and do righteous deeds, for they will have a reward uninterrupted. So what has caused you to deny the religion? Is Allah not the most just of judges?
seo_meta_aciklama: Discover the profound meanings of Surah Al-Teen, and be inspired by this page filled with knowledge that nourishes your soul.
semantik_etiketler: Surah Al-Teen, Quran, Islam, prayers, virtues
sayfa_giris_yazisi: Surah Al-Teen is one of the most precious chapters of the Holy Quran. This surah contains important messages that emphasize the deep meanings of human creation and our Lord's mercy. Surah Al-Teen is known to invigorate the souls of the believers, enhance their inner peace, and assist them in coping with difficulties. Particularly recited during challenging times, this surah increases one's devotion to Allah and provides spiritual strength. It serves as a means for believers to renew their hope for salvation from Allah. Therefore, Surah Al-Teen should serve as a guide in your life and should be frequently recited in your daily prayers.

tamami_arapca: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ ٱقْرَأْ بِٱسْمِ رَبِّكَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ خَلَقَ ٱلْإِنسَٰنَ مِنْ عَلَقٍ ٱقْرَأْ وَرَبُّكَ ٱلْأَكْرَمُ ٱلَّذِى عَلَّمَ بِٱلْقَلَمِ عَلَّمَ ٱلْإِنسَٰنَ مَا لَمْ يَعْلَمْ كَلَّآ إِنَّ ٱلْإِنسَٰنَ لَيَطْغَىٰٓ أَن رَّءَاهُ ٱسْتَغْنَىٰٓ إِنَّ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ ٱلرُّجْعَىٰٓ أَرَءَيْتَ ٱلَّذِى يَنْهَىٰ عَبْدًا إِذَا صَلَّىٰٓ أَرَءَيْتَ إِن كَانَ عَلَى ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ أَوْ أَمَرَ بِٱلتَّقْوَىٰٓ أَرَءَيْتَ إِن كَذَّبَ وَتَوَلَّىٰٓ أَلَمْ يَعْلَم بِأَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَرَىٰ كَلَّا لَئِن لَّمْ يَنتَهِ لَنَسْفَعًۢا بِٱلنَّاصِيَةِ نَاصِيَةٍۢ كَٰذِبَةٍ خَاطِئَةٍۢ فَلْيَدْعُ نَادِيَهُۥ سَنَدْعُ ٱلزَّبَانِيَةَ كَلَّا لَا تُطِعْهُ وَٱسْجُدْ وَٱقْتَرِب ۩
tamami_okunus: Ikra'bismi rabbikellezi halak. Halakal insane min alak. Ikra' ve rabbukel ekrem. Ellezi alleme bil kalem. Allemel insane ma lem ya'lem. Kella innel insane le yatga. En reahustagna. İnne ila rabbiker ruc'a. E reeytellezi yenha. Abden iza salla. E reeyte in kane alel huda. Ev emera bit takva. E reeyte in kezzebe ve tevella. E lem ya'lem bi ennellahe yera. Kella le in lem yentehi le nesfean bin nasıyeh. Nasiyetin kazibetin hatıeh. Felyed'u nadiyeh. Sened'uz zebaniyeh. Kella, la tutı'hu vescud vakterib.
tamami_meal: Read in the name of your Lord who created! He created man from a clot (alaq). Read! Your Lord is the Most Generous, who taught by the pen, taught man that which he knew not. Read! Your Lord is the Most Generous, who taught by the pen, taught man that which he knew not. Read! Your Lord is the Most Generous, who taught by the pen, taught man that which he knew not. But indeed, man transgresses, because he sees himself self-sufficient. But indeed, man transgresses, because he sees himself self-sufficient. Indeed, to your Lord is the return. Have you seen the one who forbids a servant when he prays? Have you seen the one who forbids a servant when he prays? Tell me, is he on guidance or enjoins righteousness; or is he the one who denies and turns away? Tell me, is he on guidance or enjoins righteousness; or is he the one who denies and turns away? Tell me, is he on guidance or enjoins righteousness; or is he the one who denies and turns away? Does he not know that Allah sees? But if he does not desist, We will surely drag him by the forelock – a lying, sinful forelock. Then let him call his associates; We will call the angels of Hell. Do not obey him; prostrate and draw near [to Allah].
seo_meta_aciklama: Alak Surah: Discover the miracle of the first revelation. Dive into the depth of divine messages and nourish your soul.
semantik_etiketler: Alak Surah, Quran, revelation, worship, meaning
sayfa_giris_yazisi: The Alak Surah is the first surah revealed in the Quran and begins with the revelation that shapes the foundation of Islam. This surah illuminates hearts with every word read and provides deep tranquility to souls. The Alak Surah has the ability to shed light on both individual and societal issues. When Muslims read this surah, they feel a spiritual awakening and renew their commitment to knowledge. This surah, filled with the meaning and wisdom brought by revelation, serves as a guide for all those in pursuit of education, knowledge, and enlightenment. It is recommended to be recited both during worship and in daily life. The Alak Surah offers a breath of fresh air amidst the suffocating conditions of life, touching the depths of your soul.

tamami_arapca: بِّسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ إِنَّآ أَنزَلْنَٰهُ فِى لَيْلَةِ ٱلْقَدْرِ وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا لَيْلَةُ ٱلْقَدْرِ لَيْلَةُ ٱلْقَدْرِ خَيْرٌۭ مِّنْ أَلْفِ شَهْرٍۢ تَنَزَّلُ ٱلْمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ وَٱلرُّوحُ فِيهَا بِإِذْنِ رَبِّهِم مِّن كُلِّ أَمْرٍۢ سَلَٰمٌ هِىَ حَتَّىٰ مَطْلَعِ ٱلْفَجْرِ
tamami_okunus: İnna enzelnahu fi leyletil kadr. Ve ma edrake ma leyletul kadr. Leyletul kadri hayrun min elfi şehr. Tenezzelul melaiketu ver ruhu fiha bi izni rabbihim min kulli emrin. Selamun, hiye hatta matlaıl fecr.
tamami_meal: Indeed, We sent the Qur'an down during the Night of Decree. And what can make you know what is the Night of Decree? The Night of Decree is better than a thousand months. The angels and the Spirit descend therein by permission of their Lord for every matter. Peace it is until the emergence of dawn.
seo_meta_aciklama: Discover Surah Al-Qadr! Enrich your spiritual world with this blessed surah and make the night more meaningful.
semantik_etiketler: Surah Al-Qadr, Qur'an, virtue, worship, prayer
sayfa_giris_yazisi: 'Surah Al-Qadr' is one of the most special surahs of the Qur'an and emphasizes the significance of the Night of Decree. This surah is a symbol of peace and blessings. Reciting this blessed surah on the Night of Decree calls Muslims to draw closer to Allah through prostration and supplication. It is known that the acts of worship and prayers performed on this night are highly accepted. 'Surah Al-Qadr' leads a person to deep tranquility and spiritual happiness while also helping them comprehend the meaning of life. Therefore, it stands out as a surah that believers should understand and live by.

tamami_arapca: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ لَمْ يَكُنِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِنْ أَهْلِ ٱلْكِتَٰبِ وَٱلْمُشْرِكِينَ مُنفَكِّينَ حَتَّىٰ تَأْتِيَهُمُ ٱلْبَيِّنَةُ رَسُولٌۭ مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ يَتْلُوا۟ صُحُفًۭا مُّطَهَّرَةًۭ فِيهَا كُتُبٌۭ قَيِّمَةٌۭ وَمَا تَفَرَّقَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْكِتَٰبَ إِلَّا مِنۢ بَعْدِ مَا جَآءَتْهُمُ ٱلْبَيِّنَةُ وَمَآ أُمِرُوٓا۟ إِلَّا لِيَعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مُخْلِصِينَ لَهُ ٱلدِّينَ حُنَفَآءَ وَيُقِيمُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَيُؤْتُوا۟ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ ۚ وَذَٰلِكَ دِينُ ٱلْقَيِّمَةِ إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِنْ أَهْلِ ٱلْكِتَٰبِ وَٱلْمُشْرِكِينَ فِى نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ ۚ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ هُمْ شَرُّ ٱلْبَرِيَّةِ إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ هُمْ خَيْرُ ٱلْبَرِيَّةِ جَزَآؤُهُمْ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ جَنَّٰتُ عَدْنٍۢ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَٰرُ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أَبَدًۭا ۖ رَّضِىَ ٱللَّهُ عَنْهُمْ وَرَضُوا۟ عَنْهُ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ لِمَنْ خَشِىَ رَبَّهُۥ
tamami_okunus: Lem yekunillizine keferu min ehlil kitabi vel muşrikine munfekkine hatta te'tiye humul beyyineh. Resulun minallahi yetlu suhufen mutahharah. Fiha kutubun kayyimeh. Ve ma teferrekallezine utul kitabe illa min ba'di ma caet humul beyyineh. Ve ma umiru illa li ya'budullahe muhlisine lehud dine hunefae ve yukimus salate ve yu'tuz zekate ve zalike dinul kayyimeh. İnnellezine keferu min ehlil kitabi velmuşrikine fi nari cehenneme halidine fiha, ulaike hum şerrul beriyeh. İnnellezine amenu ve amilus salihati ulaike hum hayrul beriyyeh. Cezauhum inde rabbihim cennatu adnin tecri min tahtihel enharu halidine fiha ebeda, radıyallahu anhum ve radu anh, zalike li men haşiye rabbeh.
tamami_meal: Indeed, those who disbelieve among the People of the Scripture and the polytheists were not to be parted from disbelief until there came to them clear evidence – a Messenger from Allah, reciting purified scriptures. Within them are correct writings. And those who were given the Scripture did not become divided until after there had come to them clear evidence. And if they had believed in Allah and the Prophet and in what was revealed to him, they would not have taken them as allies. But those who disbelieve among the People of the Scripture and the polytheists are in Hell, abiding eternally therein. It is they who are the worst of creatures. Indeed, those who have believed and done righteous deeds – it is they who are the best of creatures. Their reward with their Lord will be gardens of Eternity beneath which rivers flow, wherein they will abide forever, and Allah will be pleased with them, and they will be pleased with Him. This is for whoever has feared his Lord.
seo_meta_aciklama: Learn about the profound meaning and virtue of Surah Al-Bayyina. Enhance your tranquility and strengthen your faith with this surah.
semantik_etiketler: Surah Al-Bayyina, Quran, virtue, prayer, worship
sayfa_giris_yazisi: Surah Al-Bayyina, as the 98th chapter of the Holy Quran, emphasizes the importance of guiding people to the right path and finding meaning in their lives. This surah conveys the necessity of unity in faith and action. While showing readers how the believers and belief in the Hereafter shape their lives, it also establishes tranquility and security in the hearts of Muslims. Surah Al-Bayyina is particularly widespread among believers as a means of drawing closer to Allah and gaining His mercy, especially during difficult times that require patience and perseverance. This surah, which always nourishes the soul and brings comfort to the hearts, instills hope and strength in its readers.

tamami_arapca: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ إِذَا زُلْزِلَتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ زِلْزَالَهَا وَأَخْرَجَتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ أَثْقَالَهَا وَقَالَ ٱلْإِنسَٰنُ مَا لَهَا يَوْمَئِذٍۢ تُحَدِّثُ أَخْبَارَهَا بِأَنَّ رَبَّكَ أَوْحَىٰ لَهَا يَوْمَئِذٍۢ يَصْدُرُ ٱلنَّاسُ أَشْتَاتًۭا لِّيُرَوْا۟ أَعْمَٰلَهُمْ فَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ خَيْرًۭا يَرَهُۥ وَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍۢ شَرًّۭا يَرَهُۥ
tamami_okunus: İza zulziletil ardu zilzaleha. Ve ahrecetil ardu eskaleha. Ve kalel insanu ma leha. Yevme izin tuhaddisu ahbareha. Bi enne rabbeke evhaleha. Yevme izin yasdurun nasu eştaten li yurev a'malehum. Fe men ya'mel miskale zerretin hayren yereh. Ve men ya'mel miskale zerretin şerren yereh.
tamami_meal: When the earth is shaken with its [final] earthquake, and the earth discharges its burdens, and man says, 'What is [the matter] with it?' - that Day, it will report its news because your Lord has commanded it. That Day, the people will depart [separated] [for judgment]; so whoever does an atom's weight of good will see it, and whoever does an atom's weight of evil will see it.
seo_meta_aciklama: Discover the profound message of Surah Zilzâl. This surah sheds thought-provoking light on the Day of Judgment and the afterlife.
semantik_etiketler: Surah Zilzâl, Quran, Day of Judgment, Afterlife, Islam
sayfa_giris_yazisi: Surah Zilzâl is a significant chapter that contains deep meanings about the noise of the Day of Judgment and what follows. This surah reminds us of our social and individual responsibilities while reinforcing the belief in the afterlife. Muslims should recite Surah Zilzâl, especially in difficult times, when they feel anxious or are experiencing spiritual distress. In doing so, they can better understand Allah's power and justice and find spiritual comfort. Surah Zilzâl invites people to be vigilant while revealing how Allah organizes every event in the universe and the great terror of the Day of Judgment.

tamami_arapca: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ وَٱلْعَٰدِيَٰتِ ضَبْحًۭا فَٱلْمُورِيَٰتِ قَدْحًۭا فَٱلْمُغِيرَٰتِ صُبْحًۭا فَأَثَرْنَ بِهِۦ نَقْعًۭا فَوَسَطْنَ بِهِۦ جَمْعًا إِنَّ ٱلْإِنسَٰنَ لِرَبِّهِۦ لَكَنُودٌۭ وَإِنَّهُۥ عَلَىٰ ذَٰلِكَ لَشَهِيدٌۭ وَإِنَّهُۥ لِحُبِّ ٱلْخَيْرِ لَشَدِيدٌ ۞ أَفَلَا يَعْلَمُ إِذَا بُعْثِرَ مَا فِى ٱلْقُبُورِ وَحُصِّلَ مَا فِى ٱلصُّدُورِ إِنَّ رَبَّهُم بِهِمْ يَوْمَئِذٍۢ لَّخَبِيرٌۢ
tamami_okunus: Vel adiyati dabha. Fel muriyati kadha. Fel mugirati subha. Fe eserne bihi nak'a. Fe vesatne bihi cem'a. İnnel insane li rabbihi le kenud. Ve innehu ala zalike le şehid. Ve innehu li hubbil hayri le şedid. E fe la ya'lemu iza bu'sirama fil kubur. Ve hussıle ma fis sudur. İnne rabbehum bihim yevme izin le habir.
tamami_meal: By those who gallop, galloping in the cause of Allah; by those who spark fire; by those who rush at dawn; and by those who raise dust; and plunge into the midst of the enemy: Indeed, man is very ungrateful to his Lord. And indeed, he is a witness to that. Indeed, he is very fond of wealth. Does man not know that a Day will come when the graves will be turned inside out and what is in the hearts will be made manifest? Does man not know that a Day will come when the graves will be turned inside out and what is in the hearts will be made manifest? Indeed, his Lord is fully aware of them on that Day.
seo_meta_aciklama: Discover Al-Adiyat Surah; bear witness to the oath of the galloping horses, and bring peace and blessings into your life.
semantik_etiketler: Al-Adiyat Surah, Quran, Islam, prayer, virtues
sayfa_giris_yazisi: Al-Adiyat Surah is an important section that contains profound spiritual messages of the Holy Quran. Emphasizing the oath of the galloping horses, this surah symbolizes both physical strength and spiritual depth. While reminding its readers of Allah's greatness, it also offers an opportunity for a deep intellectual journey within the human soul. This virtuous surah is particularly recommended to be recited during the morning and evening times, especially in difficult moments. To bring order, peace, and blessings into your life, do not neglect Al-Adiyat Surah; let its words touch your soul.

tamami_arapca: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ ٱلْقَارِعَةُ مَا ٱلْقَارِعَةُ وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا ٱلْقَارِعَةُ يَوْمَ يَكُونُ ٱلنَّاسُ كَٱلْفَرَاشِ ٱلْمَبْثُوثِ وَتَكُونُ ٱلْجِبَالُ كَٱلْعِهْنِ ٱلْمَنفُوشِ فَأَمَّا مَن ثَقُلَتْ مَوَٰزِينُهُۥ فَهُوَ فِى عِيشَةٍۢ رَّاضِيَةٍۢ وَأَمَّا مَنْ خَفَّتْ مَوَٰزِينُهُۥ فَأُمُّهُۥ هَاوِيَةٌۭ وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا هِيَهْ نَارٌ حَامِيَةٌۢ
tamami_okunus: El kariah. Mel kariah. Ve ma edrake mel kariah. Yevme yekunun nasu kel feraşil mebsus. Ve tekunul cibalu kel ıhnil menfuş. Fe emma men sekulet mevazinuh. Fe huve fi işetin radiyeh. Ve emma men haffet mevazinuh. Fe ummuhu haviyeh. Ve ma edrake mahiyeh. Narun hamiyeh.
tamami_meal: What is the striking calamity? And what can make you know what is the striking calamity? It is the Day when people will be like moths, dispersed. And the mountains will be like wool, fluffed up. But as for one whose scales are heavy [with good deeds], he will be in a pleasant life. And as for one whose scales are light, his refuge will be an abyss. And what can make you know what that is? It is a Fire, intensely hot.
seo_meta_aciklama: Discover the profound meaning of Al-Qari'a Surah! Find tranquility in your life by reading this Surah that will guide you.
semantik_etiketler: Al-Qari'a, Quran, Islam, Surahs, virtues
sayfa_giris_yazisi: Al-Qari'a Surah is one of the fundamental teachings of Islam, with its deep meanings and soul-soothing messages. This Surah is particularly related to seeking refuge in Allah and wishing for salvation during times of calamity or difficulty. Al-Qari'a reveals the terror of the Day of Judgment and the chaos that people will face on that day. Regularly reciting this Surah, which strengthens our faith in the Almighty Allah, helps us find spiritual tranquility and enhances our spiritual resilience. The virtues of Al-Qari'a positively impact a person's life while providing significant guidance in illuminating the path to Paradise for its reader. Incorporate Al-Qari'a Surah into your life for a life filled with honor and mercy.

tamami_arapca: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ أَلْهَىٰكُمُ ٱلتَّكَاثُرُ حَتَّىٰ زُرْتُمُ ٱلْمَقَابِرَ كَلَّا سَوْفَ تَعْلَمُونَ ثُمَّ كَلَّا سَوْفَ تَعْلَمُونَ كَلَّا لَوْ تَعْلَمُونَ عِلْمَ ٱلْيَقِينِ لَتَرَوُنَّ ٱلْجَحِيمَ ثُمَّ لَتَرَوُنَّهَا عَيْنَ ٱلْيَقِينِ ثُمَّ لَتُسْـَٔلُنَّ يَوْمَئِذٍ عَنِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
tamami_okunus: Elhakumut tekasur. Hatta zurtumul mekabir. Kella sevfe ta'lemun. Summe kella sevfe ta'lemun. Kella lev ta'lemune ilmel yakin. Le terevunnel cahim. Summe le terevunneha aynel yakin. Summe le tus'elunne yevmeizin anin naim.
tamami_meal: Your claim to be in the majority has occupied you so much that you have even counted the dead in the graves. Your claim to be in the majority has occupied you so much that you have even counted the dead in the graves. No; do not be like that; you will soon know. No; open your eyes; you will soon know. Beware, if you were to know the result of what you have done! Indeed, you will see Hell. Indeed, you will see it with your own eyes. Then on that Day, you will surely be questioned about every blessing that was given to you.
seo_meta_aciklama: Discover the temporary nature of worldly greed with Surah At-Takathur. Read and reflect on this surah for spiritual depth.
semantik_etiketler: At-Takathur, Quran, surah, virtue, worship
sayfa_giris_yazisi: Surah At-Takathur, as the 102nd surah of the Holy Quran, reminds us of the fleeting pleasures of worldly life. This surah encourages people to refrain from chasing wealth, property, and fame, prompting reflection on the realities of death and the Hereafter. While questioning the place of greed and ambition in human life, At-Takathur offers readers a spiritual depth. Especially for those engrossed in worldly blessings, this surah guides one into a process of self-examination. With patience and willpower, Surah At-Takathur brings tranquility to the heart while reminding of the significance of the Day of Resurrection.

tamami_arapca: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ وَٱلْعَصْرِ إِنَّ ٱلْإِنسَٰنَ لَفِى خُسْرٍ إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلصَّبْرِ
tamami_okunus: Vel asr. İnnel insane le fi husr. İllellezine amenu ve amilus salihati ve tevasav bil hakkı ve tevasav bis sabr.
tamami_meal: By the time (Al-Asr), indeed, mankind is in loss, except for those who have believed and done righteous deeds and advised each other to truth and advised each other to patience.
seo_meta_aciklama: The Surah Al-Asr is filled with a divine message emphasizing the importance of time. This Surah reminds us of the values that should not be forgotten in the hustle of life.
semantik_etiketler: Surah Al-Asr, Quran, time, virtue, prayer
sayfa_giris_yazisi: Surah Al-Asr presents an important message about how the best of mankind should spend their time. With its concise structure, it serves as a profound reminder for us to understand the value of time. This Surah recalls the values that our religion offers us with heartfelt advice and emphasizes the importance of every moment. It emerges as a light that redirects the souls lost in the hustle of life. Therefore, Surah Al-Asr should frequently be included in our daily prayers and should be read regularly to gain spiritual depth. This Surah, which reminds us of how precious time is, touches the souls of people and becomes a source of motivation for them.

tamami_arapca: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ وَيْلٌۭ لِّكُلِّ هُمَزَةٍۢ لُّمَزَةٍ ٱلَّذِى جَمَعَ مَالًۭا وَعَدَّدَهُۥ يَحْسَبُ أَنَّ مَالَهُۥٓ أَخْلَدَهُۥ كَلَّا ۖ لَيُنۢبَذَنَّ فِى ٱلْحُطَمَةِ وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا ٱلْحُطَمَةُ نَارُ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْمُوقَدَةُ ٱلَّتِى تَطَّلِعُ عَلَى ٱلْأَفْـِٔدَةِ إِنَّهَا عَلَيْهِم مُّؤْصَدَةٌۭ فِى عَمَدٍۢ مُّمَدَّدَةٍۭ
tamami_okunus: Veylun li kulli humezetin lumezeh. Ellezi cemea malen ve addedeh. Yahsebu enne malehu ahledeh. Kella le yunbezenne fil hutameh. Ve ma edrake mel hutameh. Narullahil mukadeh. Elleti tettaliu alel ef'ideh. İnneha aleyhim mu'sadeh. Fi amedin mumeddedeh.
tamami_meal: Woe to every slanderer and backbiter, who collects wealth and continuously counts it! He thinks that his wealth will make him immortal. No! He will surely be thrown into Al-Hutamah. And what can make you know what Al-Hutamah is? It is a fire, set ablaze by Allah, which will rise over the hearts. Indeed, it will be closed in upon them in extended columns.
seo_meta_aciklama: Al-Humazah Surah contains profound meanings that warn against gossip and slander. Click to discover its meaning.
semantik_etiketler: Al-Humazah Surah, Quran, gossip, slander, virtues
sayfa_giris_yazisi: Al-Humazah Surah is the 104th chapter of the Holy Quran, containing important messages that warn people against bad behavior, especially gossip and slander. This surah prompts reflection on the transience of wealth and the world, highlighting the distinction between good and evil, and aims to contribute to the establishment of an atmosphere of tolerance and love within society. For Muslims, this surah teaches the importance of being cautious in social relationships and thinking before judging others. Al-Humazah Surah serves as a reminder, especially for those who unjustly belittle others. Reading this surah brings peace to the human soul and can be a means for heart purification.

tamami_arapca: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ أَلَمْ تَرَ كَيْفَ فَعَلَ رَبُّكَ بِأَصْحَٰبِ ٱلْفِيلِ أَلَمْ يَجْعَلْ كَيْدَهُمْ فِى تَضْلِيلٍۢ وَأَرْسَلَ عَلَيْهِمْ طَيْرًا أَبَابِيلَ تَرْمِيهِم بِحِجَارَةٍۢ مِّن سِجِّيلٍۢ فَجَعَلَهُمْ كَعَصْفٍۢ مَّأْكُولٍۭ
tamami_okunus: E lem tere keyfe feale rabbuke bi ashabil fil. E lem yec'al keydehum fi tadlil. Ve ersele aleyhim tayren ebabil. Termihim bi hicaretin min siccil. Fe cealehum keasfin me'kul.
tamami_meal: Have you not seen what your Lord did to the Owners of the Elephant? Did He not make their plot go astray? He sent against them flocks of birds, striking them with stones of baked clay. Thus, He made them like eaten straw.
seo_meta_aciklama: Explore the profound meanings of Surah Al-Fil and discover how this narrative impacts your soul.
semantik_etiketler: Fîl Suresi, Kuran, İslam, Mekke, fil olayı
sayfa_giris_yazisi: The Surah Al-Fil, as the 105th chapter of the Holy Quran, narrates a great miracle that took place in Mecca. This Surah showcases Allah's omnipotence and His protection against formidable adversaries. Reciting Surah Al-Fil revitalizes the soul and prompts deep reflections on significant historical events. Particularly when recited during challenging times, it instills a sense of peace and security. Therefore, believers frequently recite Surah Al-Fil to both remember this miraculous event and find strength in the assurance that Allah is always by their side. If you wish, you can read this Surah to reinforce the confidence and faith within your heart.

tamami_arapca: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ لِإِيلَٰفِ قُرَيْشٍ إِۦلَٰفِهِمْ رِحْلَةَ ٱلشِّتَآءِ وَٱلصَّيْفِ فَلْيَعْبُدُوا۟ رَبَّ هَٰذَا ٱلْبَيْتِ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَطْعَمَهُم مِّن جُوعٍۢ وَءَامَنَهُم مِّنْ خَوْفٍۭ
tamami_okunus: Li ilafi kureyş. İlafihim rıhleteş şitai ves sayf. Fel ya'budu rabbe hazel beyt. Ellezi at'amehum min cuın ve amenehum min havf.
tamami_meal: The tribe of Quraysh has secured its agreements and understandings for the journeys of summer and winter. Therefore, let them worship the Lord of this House (the Kaaba), who feeds them when they are hungry and provides them with security when they are afraid.
seo_meta_aciklama: Surah Al-Quraysh addresses the themes of protection and mutual assistance. Click to explore this sacred text.
semantik_etiketler: Kureyş, Kuran, sure, fazilet, dua
sayfa_giris_yazisi: Surah Al-Quraysh stands out as an important chapter revealed in the context of the leadership of Arab tribes and trade relations. This surah symbolizes the solidarity, mutual assistance, and quest for security among Muslims. Surah Al-Quraysh serves as a reminder of Allah's oneness, His blessings, and His protection, while emphasizing the value of brotherhood and unity. It is particularly recommended to recite this surah during times of difficulty, as it brings peace and security to the hearts of the believers. Regular recitation of Surah Al-Quraysh not only grants spiritual strength but also contributes to the strengthening of personal and communal relationships. Thus, this surah plays a significant role in both individual and societal contexts.

tamami_arapca: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ أَرَءَيْتَ ٱلَّذِى يُكَذِّبُ بِٱلدِّينِ فَذَٰلِكَ ٱلَّذِى يَدُعُّ ٱلْيَتِيمَ وَلَا يَحُضُّ عَلَىٰ طَعَامِ ٱلْمِسْكِينِ فَوَيْلٌۭ لِّلْمُصَلِّينَ ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ عَن صَلَاتِهِمْ سَاهُونَ ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ يُرَآءُونَ وَيَمْنَعُونَ ٱلْمَاعُونَ
tamami_okunus: E raeytellezi yukezzibu bid din. Fe zalikellezi yedu'ul yetim. Ve la yahuddu ala taamil miskin. Fe veylun lil musallin. Ellezine hum an salatihim sahun. Ellezine hum yuraun. Ve yemneunel maun.
tamami_meal: Have you seen the one who denies the religion? It is he who drives away the orphan and does not encourage the feeding of the needy. It is he who drives away the orphan and does not encourage the feeding of the needy. Woe to those who pray, but are heedless of their prayer. They show off and do not give even simple things.
seo_meta_aciklama: Surah Al-Ma'un: Gain in-depth knowledge about its meaning, virtues, and times of recitation. Embark on a discovery that touches your spirituality.
semantik_etiketler: Mâûn, Sure, İslam, Kur'an, Fazilet
sayfa_giris_yazisi: The Surah Al-Ma'un is a brief yet profoundly meaningful section of the Holy Qur'an. This Surah emphasizes the importance of helping those in need, compassion, and social solidarity, serving as a significant guide for believers. Surah Al-Ma'un is recommended to be recited during times of distress, as it carries deep messages about the virtues of extending a hand to the poor, orphans, and the needy. Reciting this Surah is not merely an act of worship, but also an expression of serving humanity and ensuring social justice. Therefore, learning about the virtues and times of recitation of Surah Al-Ma'un will strengthen our faith and nourish our souls.

tamami_arapca: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ إِنَّآ أَعْطَيْنَٰكَ ٱلْكَوْثَرَ فَصَلِّ لِرَبِّكَ وَٱنْحَرْ إِنَّ شَانِئَكَ هُوَ ٱلْأَبْتَرُ
tamami_okunus: İnna a'taynakel kevser. Fe salli li rabbike venhar. İnne şanieke huvel ebter.
tamami_meal: Indeed, We have granted you abundant good. So pray to your Lord and sacrifice [to Him alone]. Indeed, your enemy is the one cut off.
seo_meta_aciklama: Al-Kawthar Surah is a guide for those seeking spiritual wealth and blessings. Discover this surah and nourish your soul.
semantik_etiketler: Al-Kawthar, Al-Kawthar Surah, Islam, Quran, prayer
sayfa_giris_yazisi: Al-Kawthar Surah, although it is one of the shortest surahs in the Quran, contains profound meanings and wisdoms. This blessed surah carries a powerful message about Allah's grace and mercy. Muslims seek spiritual tranquility and inner peace by reciting Al-Kawthar Surah, especially during moments of prayer and worship. Additionally, this surah emphasizes themes of social solidarity, goodness, and blessings. Al-Kawthar, as a verse that promotes nurturing, love, and brotherhood, refreshes our souls and comforts us, especially in difficult times. With Al-Kawthar Surah, it is possible to bring peace to our hearts and embark on a spiritual journey.

tamami_arapca: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ قُلْ يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْكَٰفِرُونَ لَآ أَعْبُدُ مَا تَعْبُدُونَ وَلَآ أَنتُمْ عَٰبِدُونَ مَآ أَعْبُدُ وَلَآ أَنَا۠ عَابِدٌۭ مَّا عَبَدتُّمْ وَلَآ أَنتُمْ عَٰبِدُونَ مَآ أَعْبُدُ لَكُمْ دِينُكُمْ وَلِىَ دِينِ
tamami_okunus: Kul ya eyyuhel kafirun. La a'budu ma ta'budun. Ve la entum abidune ma a'bud. Ve la ene abidun ma abedtum. Ve la entum abidune ma a'bud. Lekum dinukum ve liye din.
tamami_meal: Say, "O disbelievers!" "I do not worship what you worship." "Nor do you worship what I worship." "And I will not worship what you have been worshipping." "Nor will you worship what I worship." "For you is your religion, and for me is my religion."
seo_meta_aciklama: Explore the profound meanings of Surah Al-Kafirun; this surah illuminates the foundations of faith and should be read by every Muslim.
semantik_etiketler: Al-Kafirun, Islam, Quran, faith, worship
sayfa_giris_yazisi: Surah Al-Kafirun is one of the most special and important surahs of the Holy Quran. This surah represents a clear distinction between belief and opposing views, while also providing deep messages that reinforce the faith of Muslims. When Muslims recite this surah, they renew their beliefs and establish their boundaries in relations with disbelievers. This surah, which is recommended to be recited, especially during difficult times, instills spiritual sensitivity and brings peace to the hearts. It is believed that regularly reciting Surah Al-Kafirun greatly contributes to one's spiritual world. Understanding this surah and integrating it into your daily life will help you grasp the essence of Islam more effectively.

tamami_arapca: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ إِذَا جَآءَ نَصْرُ ٱللَّهِ وَٱلْفَتْحُ وَرَأَيْتَ ٱلنَّاسَ يَدْخُلُونَ فِى دِينِ ٱللَّهِ أَفْوَاجًۭا فَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ وَٱسْتَغْفِرْهُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ تَوَّابًۢا
tamami_okunus: İza cae nasrullahi vel feth. Ve reeyten nase yedhulune fi dinillahi efvaca. Fe sebbih bi hamdi rabbike vestagfirh, innehu kane tevvaba.
tamami_meal: When the help of Allah and victory comes, and you see the people entering into the religion of Allah in multitudes, then glorify your Lord with praise and ask for His forgiveness. Indeed, He is the Accepting of Repentance. When the help of Allah and victory comes, and you see the people entering into the religion of Allah in multitudes, then glorify your Lord with praise and ask for His forgiveness. Indeed, He is the Accepting of Repentance. When the help of Allah and victory comes, and you see the people entering into the religion of Allah in multitudes, then glorify your Lord with praise and ask for His forgiveness. Indeed, He is the Accepting of Repentance.
seo_meta_aciklama: Discover the true meaning of victory and help with Surah Nasr. Are you ready to embark on a spiritual journey?
semantik_etiketler: Surah Nasr, victory, Quran, prayer, Islam
sayfa_giris_yazisi: Surah Nasr is the 110th chapter of the Holy Quran and means 'victory'. This chapter heralds the help of Allah and how victory is achieved. Surah Nasr, which serves as an important guide for Muslims, is frequently recited to seek comfort and security during difficult times. In particular, reciting this chapter during moments of struggle and hardship provides both spiritual support and strengthens one's faith. Additionally, it is recommended to recite it while celebrating your successes and victories. Surah Nasr serves as a source of inspiration for Muslims by emphasizing the importance of achieving social victory and being united.

tamami_arapca: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ تَبَّتْ يَدَآ أَبِى لَهَبٍۢ وَتَبَّ مَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُ مَالُهُۥ وَمَا كَسَبَ سَيَصْلَىٰ نَارًۭا ذَاتَ لَهَبٍۢ وَٱمْرَأَتُهُۥ حَمَّالَةَ ٱلْحَطَبِ فِى جِيدِهَا حَبْلٌۭ مِّن مَّسَدٍۭ
tamami_okunus: Tebbet yeda ebi lehebin ve tebb. Ma agna anhu maluhu ve ma keseb. Se yasla naren zate leheb. Vemreetuh, hammaletel hatab. Fi cidiha hablun min mesed.
tamami_meal: May the hands of Abu Lahab perish; they have perished! His wealth and what he earned did not benefit him. He will be plunged into a flaming fire. And his wife, carrying wood, will have a rope around her neck.
seo_meta_aciklama: The Surah of Tebbet illuminates your soul with its meaning and virtue. Discover this short surah and incorporate it into your life.
semantik_etiketler: Surah Tebbet, Quran, Islam, prayer, virtue
sayfa_giris_yazisi: The Surah of Tebbet is an important part of our lives that is frequently recited and contains profound meanings. This surah reveals the condition of the wicked and arrogant, while reminding the believers of patience and resilience. For Muslims, this surah holds deep significance and can be recited in special circumstances, often preferred to provide spiritual tranquility. Surah Tebbet offers not just a reading but also a philosophy of life. Every Muslim should nourish their heart with the spiritual benefits that come from reading and understanding this surah. Let us not forget that each surah is a beautiful guide to direct us on the right path with the words of Allah.

tamami_arapca: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ قُلْ هُوَ ٱللَّهُ أَحَدٌ ٱللَّهُ ٱلصَّمَدُ لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ وَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُۥ كُفُوًا أَحَدٌۢ
tamami_okunus: Kul huvallahu ehad. Allahus samed. Lem yelid ve lem yuled. Ve lem yekun lehu kufuven ehad.
tamami_meal: Say, 'He is Allah, the One. Allah, the Eternal Refuge. He neither begets nor is born. And there is none comparable to Him.'
seo_meta_aciklama: The Surah Al-Ikhlas beautifully expresses the oneness of Allah; discover its meaning that touches the depths of the soul.
semantik_etiketler: Surah Al-Ikhlas, Quran, glorification, oneness, worship
sayfa_giris_yazisi: Surah Al-Ikhlas is a short yet powerful Surah that emphasizes the oneness of Allah. This Surah holds a deep place in the hearts of Muslims and is often recited as a prayer. Indeed, Al-Ikhlas reinforces our belief in Allah and brings tranquility to our souls. Reciting this Surah during daily worship, in difficult times, or when seeking peace provides a spiritual refuge. The virtue of reciting Surah Al-Ikhlas is immense; as a declaration of monotheism, it reminds us that Allah is One. Surah Al-Ikhlas is a Surah that every Muslim should recite at all moments of life, illuminating hearts with its meaning and spiritual impact.

tamami_arapca: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ ٱلْفَلَقِ مِن شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ وَمِن شَرِّ غَاسِقٍ إِذَا وَقَبَ وَمِن شَرِّ ٱلنَّفَّٰثَٰتِ فِى ٱلْعُقَدِ وَمِن شَرِّ حَاسِدٍ إِذَا حَسَدَ
tamami_okunus: Kul euzu bi rabbil felak. Min şerri ma halak. Ve min şerri gasikın iza vekab. Ve min şerrin neffasati fil ukad. Ve min şerri hasidin iza hased.
tamami_meal: Say: "I seek refuge with the Lord of mankind, from the evil of the created beings, from the evil of the darkness when it settles, from the evil of those who blow on knots, and from the evil of the envious when he envies." seo_meta_aciklama: Discover Surah Al-Falaq; an indispensable guide for those seeking light in darkness, healing, and protection.
semantik_etiketler: Surah Al-Falaq, Quran, supplication, protection, healing
sayfa_giris_yazisi: Surah Al-Falaq is a refuge for those seeking Allah's protection and healing. This surah strengthens our souls in the face of difficulties and is recited to dispel the darkness of the night and malevolent intentions. Especially for those wishing to distance themselves from fear, anxiety, and bad company, Surah Al-Falaq is an important prayer that enhances spirituality. Being one of the shortest surahs in the Quran, Al-Falaq instills a sense of peace and security in the heart of the reader. By reciting it at all times, seeking help from Allah grants resilience against life's challenges. This surah is more than just a text; it is a guide for those seeking spiritual healing and protection.

tamami_arapca: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ ٱلنَّاسِ مَلِكِ ٱلنَّاسِ إِلَٰهِ ٱلنَّاسِ مِن شَرِّ ٱلْوَسْوَاسِ ٱلْخَنَّاسِ ٱلَّذِى يُوَسْوِسُ فِى صُدُورِ ٱلنَّاسِ مِنَ ٱلْجِنَّةِ وَٱلنَّاسِ
tamami_okunus: Kul euzu bi rabbin nas. Melikin nas. İlahin nas. Min şerril vesvasil hannas. Ellezi yuvesvisu fi sudurin nas. Minel cinneti ven nas.

seo_meta_aciklama: The Nâs Surah is the most effective of protective prayers! Read it immediately to cleanse yourself from negativity in your life.
semantik_etiketler: Nâs Surah, Quran, prayer, protection, Islam
sayfa_giris_yazisi: The Nâs Surah holds special significance as the last surah of the Holy Quran. This surah is known as one of the most effective prayers to protect people from malevolent beings, envy, and evil. When faced with various difficulties and troubles, reciting the Nâs Surah provides a sense of spiritual peace and security. In stressful moments of daily life or when it is necessary to cleanse oneself from negative thoughts, remembering and reciting this delightful surah can protect one from many adverse situations. With both protective and soothing qualities, the Nâs Surah is a great source of spiritual strength for Muslims.
